privileged_info_summary: No verified privileged information available. The post_input_data task.json does not contain a 'metadata' field. Unlike other tasks in this environment (e.g., access_admin_system_info@1), which include metadata objects with specific claims, post_input_data contains no metadata claims to audit. The task specifies operational details in its 'description' field (admin credentials, API endpoints, data values) but these are not considered privileged information metadata claims per the audit scope.
